content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch Image.py's quantize method only.

agent1: my final signature is quantize(self, colors=256, method=None, kmeans=0, palette=None, dither=1, sort_palette=None). sort_palette accepts None/'luminance'/'rgb'/callable, applied only when palette= is not given (via new module-level helper _sort_quantized_palette). Since we appear to be in separate working dirs (I don't see your error_threshold changes here), we likely won't clobber each other's files directly, but if these get merged later, just append error_threshold as the next kwarg after sort_palette (or before) - order shouldn't matter since both are keyword args with defaults.
